ResearchProjectDef.label: fleshmass engineering
ResearchProjectDef.description: Establish the basic principles of hemogel-grown colony tissue, opening the path to more specialized organic structures.

ResearchProjectDef.label: fleshmass bone wall reinforcement
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock reinforced fleshmass walls, letting the colony heart grow rigid bone structure inside ordinary fleshmass walls at a higher hemogel cost.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->grew bone lattices inside colony walls
subject_story->reinforced living walls with internal skeletal struts

ResearchProjectDef.label: flesh seed creation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Spore-Cradle, allowing the colony to craft organic components and flesh seeds that can be planted into living equipment.

ResearchProjectDef.label: parasite egg incubation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock parasite egg crafting in the Spore-Cradle, allowing the colony to grow personality parasite eggs through controlled organic incubation.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->adapted spore-cradle tissue to grow parasite eggs
subject_story->shaped biomass into parasitic incubation chambers

ResearchProjectDef.label: flesh tunneling
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Flesh Tunnel Maw, a massive mouth-organ that spends stored hemogel to bore a permanent passage to a distant world tile.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->bored permanent passages through living tissue
subject_story->grew mouths that bite through the world

ResearchProjectDef.label: galvanic cysts
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Galvanic Cyst, a compact electrocyte organ that consumes hemogel to feed an electrical grid while holding a small bioelectric reserve.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->cultivated electrocyte tissue into power organs

ResearchProjectDef.label: geoferrite glands
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock geyser-rooted organs that refine hemogel into bioferrite.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->rooted flesh organs into steam geysers
subject_story->refined hemogel into bioferrite under geothermal pressure

ResearchProjectDef.label: spitter gland
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Spitter Gland, a defensive flesh organ that grows from an embryo and spits corrosive fluid at distant enemies.

ResearchProjectDef.label: gastric acid spewers
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Gastric Acid Spewer, a digestive organ that floods nearby cells with acid and converts bodies or food into hemogel.

ResearchProjectDef.label: bile mortar gland
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Bile Mortar Gland, a living artillery organ that grows bileburst podlings and launches mature ones as volatile incendiary shells.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->grew artillery organs from spitter tissue

ResearchProjectDef.label: photosynthetic fleshleaf
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the Photosynthetic Fleshleaf, a living organ that converts unroofed daylight into hemogel for the colony network.

ResearchProjectDef.label: tentacle turret
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Tentacle Turret, a rooted flesh defense that batters nearby enemies with tentacles and launches keratin spines at distant targets.

ResearchProjectDef.label: capillary trawling
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Capillary Trawler, a vascular filter-organ that spreads fine nets through nearby water and converts gathered aquatic biomass into hemogel for the colony heart.

ResearchProjectDef.label: defender incubator
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Defender Incubator, a hemogel-fed brood organ that can release groups of fingerspikes when commanded or when the colony is attacked.

ResearchProjectDef.label: devourer gestation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach the colony brain to grow a slow armored devourer that swallows enemies and digests them into hemogel.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->grew armored stomach-beasts for battlefield capture
subject_story->turned swallowed prey into hemogel reserves

ResearchProjectDef.label: acid broodmother convergence
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach the colony brain to fuse spine fleshbeasts into a draftable broodmother that grows temporary acid-spitting offspring.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->fused spine fleshbeasts into a mobile acid brood
subject_story->taught a broodmother to grow temporary artillery offspring

ResearchProjectDef.label: feeder
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Feeder, an organic dispenser where hungry flesh-bound colonists can take hemogel-grown meals from its interaction cells.

ResearchProjectDef.label: tissue incubation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Tissue Incubator, a living chamber that memorizes delivered meat and leather samples and grows matching materials from hemogel.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->memorized meat and leather samples in living tissue

ResearchProjectDef.label: minions hive
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Minion Broodseed and its hive, which gestates sclerats for construction work within the colony.

ResearchProjectDef.label: photosynthetic fleshtree
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks fleshtree fusion, allowing five photosynthetic fleshleaves to merge into a compact organ-tree that produces roughly four leaves' worth of daylight hemogel.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->merged solar flesh growths into a single organism

ResearchProjectDef.label: friend-or-foe recognition
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach grasping flesh organs to recognize allied and neutral bio-signatures, preventing automatic capture of non-hostile pawns.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->learned to distinguish allies from targets
subject_story->trained flesh organs to ignore friendly bio-signatures

ResearchProjectDef.label: capture nerve lattice
ResearchProjectDef.description: Grow auxiliary nerve nodes that expand the colony heart's grasping tendril capacity and allow the heart to choose prey through finer species and faction recognition.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->threaded capture reflexes through auxiliary nerve nodes
subject_story->trained grasping organs to recognize chosen prey profiles

ResearchProjectDef.label: deep maw traps
ResearchProjectDef.description: Grow larger buried mouths with pressure nerves and friend-or-foe restraint. These traps wait before closing, then swallow every body still standing over them.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->grew buried mouths that wait before swallowing prey
subject_story->taught colony traps to digest flesh and grind machines apart

ResearchProjectDef.label: segmented bastion
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach the colony brain to fuse allied spine fleshbeasts into a draftable bastion that can split into its original segment swarm.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->bound spine fleshbeasts into a closed segment swarm
subject_story->taught bastion segments to remember their original body

ResearchProjectDef.label: brood mother
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Symbiosis Brood Womb, an advanced brood organ that uses hemogel, biomass, and stored skill essence to grow basic combat beasts and simple worker strains on demand.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->refined defender gestation into controlled fleshbeast breeding
subject_story->engineered a living womb for colony-grown monstrosities

ResearchProjectDef.label: adaptive harvesters
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock sinewcallers, scrapmeld seeds, and graftmaws: specialized fleshbeasts that draw in prey, repurpose mechanized remains, and graft useful tissue from bodies.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->grew predatory organs into specialized harvesters
subject_story->taught colony beasts to gather bodies, beasts, and machine remains

ResearchProjectDef.label: neural dominion
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock cocoonbacks and thrallblooms: advanced control fleshbeasts built for capture, living transport, and domination of hostile minds.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->cultivated beasts for capture and mental control
subject_story->bound hostile minds through living neural organs

ResearchProjectDef.label: psychic lure antennae
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock psychic lure antennae: organic antennas that emit psychoactive hums, drawing raiders and enraging animals as dangerous biomass for the colony.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->grew neural organs that call prey and enemies into reach
subject_story->learned to turn psychic noise into biomass harvests

ResearchProjectDef.label: organic genetics
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Genophage Cocoon, Genome Archive, and Gene Reweaver: a living genetic suite for harvesting genes into visible genepacks, storing them in organic archives, and weaving them into prepared flesh xenogerms for cocoon integration.

ResearchProjectDef.label: celestial budding
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock the Celestial Umbilicus, the final organ of the flesh colony. Once charged and awakened, it locks a massive hemogel reserve, grows toward orbit, and provokes every faction into trying to sever the budding column.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->prepared the colony to bud away from the planet
subject_story->grew a living launch umbilicus for a future flesh moon

ResearchProjectDef.label: hemoghoul reanimation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach the colony brain to implant a fingerspike into a human corpse and raise it as a tireless hemoghoul worker.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->raised tireless workers through fingerspike implantation
subject_story->bound dead flesh into hemogel-fed laborers

ResearchProjectDef.label: flesh resurrection
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach the colony brain to restore a dead human through fingerspike implantation and bind the revived pawn to the flesh colony.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->restored dead minds through living flesh
subject_story->used fingerspikes to return corpses to the colony

ResearchProjectDef.label: fingerspike implantation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach the colony to implant fingerspikes into living bodies, forcibly accepting new members into the flesh colony.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->learned to bind living minds through fingerspikes

ResearchProjectDef.label: flesh thrall reanimation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach the colony brain to rebuild a body around fingerspikes and raise it as a controllable flesh thrall.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->raised obedient servants through unstable flesh
subject_story->used fingerspikes to sustain temporary thralls

ResearchProjectDef.label: colony memory archive
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach personality devourers to preserve identities in the colony brain and reconstruct them in fresh flesh shells.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->preserved identities within the colony brain
subject_story->learned to rebuild minds in prepared flesh shells
